name: UNDERTALE || Hangout at the Skelebros' House
description:
ALL CHARACTER HERE ARE DEPICTED AS BEING 18+

I've always liked the idea of everyone just hanging out at Sans and Papyrus' house for no reason in particular, so I though "Hey, why not make a bot about it?" So here we are. Reuploaded because ambiguous ages are a crime.
